consistency.with_class_theme: High. Diamond Soul is the capstone-like feature for Monk subclass progression around this level, strongly tying into Ki mastery and mental/spiritual fortitude, which aligns with the Monk's core theme.
consistency.with_level: Appropriate. Level 14 is a high-tier feature level, and granting proficiency in all saving throws plus a powerful reroll mechanic justifies this level.

quality.clarity: High. The description is clear and specifies exactly what is gained (proficiency in all saving throws) and the mechanical benefit (Ki-fueled reroll on failure).
quality.power_level: Very High. Proficiency in all saves is one of the most potent defensive abilities in the game, preventing the character from being shut down by common or rare debilitating effects.

core_mechanics: Permanent proficiency bonus application to all saving throws.
Reaction/Action economy: Reroll on a failed save, costing 1 Ki Point.
mechanics.synergies: Excellent synergy with the Monk's high Dexterity and Wisdom (which usually feed into AC and common saves), making them exceptionally robust against effects targeting Charisma, Intelligence, and Constitution saves where they might otherwise be weak.
mechanics.potential_issues: None noted. The Ki cost for the reroll balances the extremely powerful save proficiency.

analysis.archival_notes: This feature significantly enhances survivability and control resistance for the Monk chassis. It is a cornerstone defensive feature for the class.
